note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 1: Zoë struggles to focus on her research as Mateo's cryptic message lingers in her mind. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Paper Nobody Cites") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 2: Zoë tries to decipher cryptic notes on Mateo's research project Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Paper Nobody Cites") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 3: Zoë tries to decipher Mateo's cryptic notes on Dr. Baeza's research. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Paper Nobody Cites") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 4: Zoë discovers Mateo's hidden research on Dr. Baeza's project, sparking her growing suspicion. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Paper Nobody Cites") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 5: Zoë discovers Mateo's hastily deleted email about an unexplained lab anomaly. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Paper Nobody Cites") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 6: Zoë discovers Mateo's paper has been quietly removed from the university database. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Paper Nobody Cites") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 7: Zoë confronts Mateo about Marina's cryptic message and the eerie lab atmosphere. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Paper Nobody Cites") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 8: Zoë tries to decipher Mateo's cryptic warnings about Dr. Baeza's research. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Paper Nobody Cites") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 9: Zoë confronts Mateo about his evasive responses to her questions on Dr. Baeza's research. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Paper Nobody Cites") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 10: Zoë presses Mateo for more on Dr. Baeza's research, sensing evasions. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Paper Nobody Cites") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 11: Zoë tries to make sense of Mateo's research on Dr. Baeza's project Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Paper Nobody Cites") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 12: Zoë tries to understand Mateo's motives for sharing the paper. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Paper Nobody Cites") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 13: Zoë discovers Mateo's hidden research on Dr. Baeza's project Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Paper Nobody Cites") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 14: Zoë discovers a disturbing connection between Dr. Baeza's research and the recent lab accidents. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Paper Nobody Cites") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 15: Mateo's cryptic message sparks Zoë's investigation into Dr. Baeza's research. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Paper Nobody Cites") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 16: Zoë discovers Mateo's hidden research on Dr. Baeza's project, fuelling her growing suspicion. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Paper Nobody Cites") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 17: Zoë's escalating paranoia solidifies as she deletes her research, severing ties to the incriminating paper. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Paper Nobody Cites") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.
